title: Sky's Flowers
description: A mod that adds and improves flowers! 🏵️
body:
![information](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b715b74e1e5c19f43fddeccf203b55c223c175cd.png)

▪ This mod adds 11 new large variations of vanilla flowers and one new functional block: the Large Flower Pot! This block allows you to place large flowers into a flower pot. It works with both new flowers and vanilla ones!

![new block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f51eef6ff09d6236b783d910d110ac70fba191ee.png)

![large flower pot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8ab167625756b50d26149952dc7b5d5a56d1381a.png)

![new flowers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fb0dfe051de91d5ad66100c56ff207d747b81361.png)

![blue orchid](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/73de16e30955d5dfad0904397e0e22eadb497d88.png)

![large dandelion](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/74bef8b41d79881bf44dd729751a5d9cc3a8aa66.png)

![large azure bluet](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/374ff9b7e1e51f35838a96117cfe0c0cef87b3bc.png)

![large cornflower](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b166fc4f3902e70ebf630ef103f501333413fec2.png)

![large allium](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/012a996dd061ab07acc3c3e206c8e28f5341e612.png)

![large lily](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/84bca3913114a53c66995ab496a0fc6c1f9761a0.png)

![large oxeye daisy](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eac8a216ab5dec9bd2361a3c1e4bcd6864f45824.png)

![large white tulip](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c4f6fd40512489955f08241a14511f5d231319bb.png)

![large pink tulip](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fbb5c444fdd4aabdea5351ae538aa1b05a11f5a6.png)

![large orange tulip](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/802bca87cab389dfa20deb5062e795222ef3da83.png)

![large red tulip](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/de002168f45779f47c64591b48f01ab05f32e087.png)

### _And more..._

![updates](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4883b9469efee418a9dd6085c072489897a69eb4.png)

▪ I plan to add even more flowers with each update and will work on bringing you a fabric port as soon as possible. <3

![usage](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/80950c517e0208c711f209a0bf77d165f790d564.png)

▪ **YOU MAY** use this in your modpack on CurseForge with or without credit.

▪ **YOU MAY** use this mod in your video with credit!

▪ **YOU MAY NOT** redistribute this mod on other websites.
